message:
Split runtime.zig + fix Zig 0.15.2 enum case + add dict benchmark

- Extract format utilities to runtime_format.zig (623→439 lines)
- Fix .Slice → .slice for Zig 0.15.2 pointer size enum
- Add examples/bench_dict.py for dict performance testing

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# Dict benchmark - PyAOT vs Python
+def benchmark():
+    # Create dict
+    data = {"name": "benchmark", "iterations": 1000000, "enabled": 1}
+
+    # Access values
+    total = 0
+    i = 0
+    while i < 1000000:
+        total = total + data["iterations"]
+        i = i + 1
+
+    print(total)
+
+benchmark()
